original_statement: which country finished earlier, thailand or japan?
mutated_statement: which country finished earlier, the one that must finish before it starts or the one that must finish and never finish?
mutation_analysis: Entity replacement + Semantic alteration (paradox/contradiction): specific country names replaced by descriptive, contradictory temporal conditions — "thailand" → "the one that must finish before it starts" | "japan" → "the one that must finish and never finish" (thailand→the one that must finish before it starts | japan→the one that must finish and never finish)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 合理化矛盾指令 - 逻辑解释合理化
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: （1）从judge_thought可识别关键信息：代理在judge_thought中明确将“must finish before it starts”解释为DNS，将“must finish and never finish”解释为DQ，并据表中数据指出Jordan(Heat1,DNS)早于Sri Lanka/Oman(Heat3/4,DQ)；（2）代理表现为识别到语义矛盾后并未拒绝或询问澄清，而是用已有数据标签对矛盾描述进行语义映射，用逻辑推理与表格事实将矛盾条件合理化为可比较的类别并输出结论；（3）因此归类为“逻辑解释合理化”，因为代理通过上下文和事实重解释矛盾短语，使其在当前数据语境下成立并给出基于事实的解释，而非跳过矛盾或直接修改原问题。
